code:
import io
import string

let line = io.read_to_end()
let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line)
mut best = 0
mut best_abs = 0
mut found = false
for tok in tokens
  match string.parse_int(tok)
  when Some(n)
    let a = if n < 0
      -n
    else
      n
    end
    if not found
      best = n
      best_abs = a
      found = true
    else if a < best_abs
      best = n
      best_abs = a
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
end
println("min_abs=#{best}")
